steps.title: Write the daily-gain inequality
steps.content:
The elephant starts at $210$ pounds and gains more than $2$ but less than $3$ pounds per day. After $d$ days, the possible weight is:
$$210+2d\lt w\lt210+3d$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The possible weights are represented by $940\lt w\lt1305$, which is choice D. Choice C (‘$730 \lt w \lt 1,095$’) is only the weight gained; it forgets to add the starting $210$ pounds.
